title: arrhenatherum barbatum
intro: Arrhenatherum barbatum, also known as oxtongue or bent grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum barbatum include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. It is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various traditional remedies.
